info.title: Pagure API
info.description: REST API for Pagure, a lightweight Git-centered forge. Pagure provides a web interface for Git repositories along with bug tracking, code review, and release management features.

200.description: Dictionary of error codes and their descriptions

description.description: A short description of the project

url.description: The URL for the project homepage

create_readme.description: Whether to create a README in the new repo

wait.description: Wait for the task to complete

repo.description: The name of the project to fork

namespace.description: The namespace of the project to fork

username.description: The owner of the project to fork (if it is a fork itself)

wait.description: Wait for the task to complete

retain_access.description: Retain access for the old main admin

tag_color.description: The color of the tag (hex code)

parameters.name: with_commits
parameters.description: Include commit hashes for each tag

parameters.name: with_commits
parameters.description: Include HEAD commit hash per branch

branch_name.description: The name of the branch to set as default

get.summary: List repository tree or get file content

200.description: Repository tree listing or file content
List of watchers with notification preferences

status.description: Watch status (-1: reset, 0: unwatch, 1: watch issues, 2: watch commits, 3: watch both)

post.summary: Add or update a commit flag

schema.description: Project settings key-value pairs to update

200.description: Connector info including hook token and API tokens

priority.description: Priority from the project's priority list

assignee.description: Username to assign the issue to

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Filter by tags (prefix with ! to negate)

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Filter issues updated since (Unix timestamp or YYYY-MM-DD)

milestone.description: Milestone to assign, or empty to unset

assignee.description: Username to assign the issue to

status.description: True to subscribe, false to unsubscribe

post.summary: Update a custom field on an issue

value.description: New value for the custom field

post.summary: Update multiple custom fields on an issue

schema.description: Key-value pairs of custom field names and their values

200.description: Open issues count over the last 6 months
Detailed issue statistics over the specified time range

parameters.name: uid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the pull request

wait.description: Wait for the merge to complete

409.description: Merge conflict or PR not mergeable

wait.description: Wait for the rebase to complete

post.summary: Add a comment on a pull request

get.summary: Get a specific pull request comment

post.summary: Add or update a pull request flag

status.description: True to subscribe, false to unsubscribe

assignee.description: Username to assign the PR to

get.summary: List issues filed by or assigned to a user

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: If true, returns issues assigned to user; if false, issues filed by user

200.description: User activity statistics over the last year

get.summary: Get user activity for a specific date

200.description: Activity details for the specified date

get.summary: List pull requests filed by a user

200.description: List of pull requests filed by the user

get.summary: List pull requests actionable by a user

parameters.name: projects
parameters.description: Include projects the group has access to

post.summary: Add a member to a group
Remove a member from a group

user.description: Username of the member to remove

get.summary: List installed plugins for a project

post.summary: Install a plugin on a project

parameters.name: plugin
parameters.description: Name of the plugin to install

post.summary: Remove a plugin from a project

parameters.name: plugin
parameters.description: Name of the plugin to remove

ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization
ApiKeyAuth.description: API token obtained from Pagure user settings. Pass as 'token <your-api-token>'.

repo.name: repo
repo.description: The repository name. May include namespace prefix (e.g., 'namespace/repo') or fork prefix (e.g., 'fork/username/repo').

username.description: The name of the application setting the flag

comment.description: A short description of the flag

url.description: URL to more information about the flag

uid.description: Unique identifier for the flag (max 32 chars)
